transcript: Speaker A: jo AI ka reels dekhega vo piche reh jayega lekin aaj jo AI ke sath sikhega vo duniya me aage jayega. Friends, sach simple hai, future unka hoga jo confidently English bol payenge. Aap bolenge English sikhane ke lie paisa lagega, course karna padega? Nahi, bas ek kam karo, SpeakX download karo. SpeakX ek AI powered English learning app hai jaha AI teachers aapko hindi me samajha kar step by step English bolna sikhate hain. Words se start, sentences, phir real life practice: interviews, meetings, presentations. Roz sirf 15 minute, phone pe scrolling kam karo, AI se speaking practice zyada karo. AI ko entertainment ka tool mat banao, AI ko apni growth ka weapon banao. Install now par click karo, SpeakX download karo. Next time jab bolo, English me bolo. [Those who just watch AI reels will fall behind, but those who learn with AI today will move ahead in the world. Friends, the truth is simple: the future belongs to those who can speak English confidently. You might say learning English requires money or a course? No, just do one thing, download SpeakX. SpeakX is an AI-powered English learning app where AI teachers explain in Hindi and teach you to speak English step-by-step. Start with words, then sentences, then real-life practice: interviews, meetings, presentations. Just 15 minutes a day, reduce phone scrolling, and practice speaking more with AI. Don't make AI an entertainment tool, make AI your growth weapon. Click Install Now, download SpeakX. Next time you speak, speak in English.]
on_screen_text: jo AI ka reels dekhega vo piche lekin aaj jo AI ke sath sikhega vo duniya me aage Friends sach simple hai future unka hoga jo confidently English bol payenge Aap bolenge English sikhane ke lie paisa lagega course karna padega Nahi bas ek kam karo SpeakX download karo SpeakX ek AI powered English learning app hai jaha AI teachers aapko hindi me samajha kar step by step English bolna sikhate hain Words se start sentences phir real life practice interviews meetings presentations Roz sirf 15 minute phone pe scrolling kam karo AI se practice zyada karo AI ko entertainment ka tool mat banao AI ko apni growth ka weapon banao Install now par click karo SpeakX download karo next time jab bolo English me bolo [Captions matching the spoken Hindi words in Latin script]
summary: The ad urges viewers to stop wasting time scrolling on social media and instead use AI to learn English. It introduces SpeakX, an AI-powered app that teaches English step-by-step with Hindi explanations. The call to action encourages downloading the app to build a better future.
